studies.title: Study Details | NCT05156320 | Efficacy and Safety of Apitegromab in ...
studies.abstract: This Phase 3 trial (Study SRK-015-003) was conducted in patients ≥2 years old at Screening, who were previously diagnosed with later-onset spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) (i.e., Type 2 and Type 3 SMA) and were receiving an approved survival motor neuron (SMN) upregulator therapy (i.e., either nusinersen or risdiplam), to confirm the efficacy and safety of apitegromab as an adjunctive therapy ...
studies.brief_summary: This Phase 3 trial (Study SRK-015-003) was conducted in patients ≥2 years old at Screening, who were previously diagnosed with later-onset spinal muscular atrophy (SMA) (i.e., Type 2 and Type 3 SMA) and were receiving an approved survival motor neuron (SMN) upregulator therapy (i.e., either nusinersen or risdiplam), to confirm the efficacy and safety of apitegromab as an adjunctive therapy ...

_verification.reason: The study is about the efficacy and safety of apitegromab in patients with spinal muscular atrophy, not about Somryst or any digital therapeutic for insomnia.
